commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5fe81b41d45a2cdde1d445058c1a16e82e613aa2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR widens the Feishu monitor runtime option, calls `setFeishuRuntime` when a plugin-shaped runtime is detected, and adds mocked startup coverage for that path.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +39. Total +54 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the current gateway start path passes `RuntimeEnv` into `monitorFeishuProvider`, while Feishu inbound handling requires `getFeishuRuntime()` to be initialized before `core.channel.*` dispatch. I did not run live Feishu credentials in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and contributor action are needed because the patch misses the current gateway runtime shape and the external PR still needs real Feishu/gateway proof before merge.

target.title: Fix Feishu monitor runtime initialization
target.body:
Fixes #88024

Note: this pull request was made with AI assistance.

## Summary
- Initialize the Feishu plugin runtime when the gateway starts the Feishu monitor with a plugin runtime.
- Add startup regression coverage that verifies monitor startup stores the runtime before account monitors run.

## Verification
- `docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo:/workspace -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/monitor.startup.test.ts'` (6 tests passed)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Feishu WebSocket monitor startup now stores the gateway plugin runtime before account monitor dispatch, so inbound handlers using `getFeishuRuntime()` do not see an uninitialized runtime.
Real environment tested: Containerized OpenClaw checkout using `node:24-bookworm` with workspace dependencies installed; no live Feishu credentials.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo:/workspace -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/monitor.startup.test.ts'`
Evidence after fix: Terminal output copied from the container run:
```console
$ docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo:/workspace -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/monitor.startup.test.ts'
RUN v4.1.7 /workspace
✓ extension-feishu ../../extensions/feishu/src/monitor.startup.test.ts (6 tests) 6725ms
Test Files 1 passed (1)
Tests 6 passed (6)
```
Observed result after fix: The copied terminal output shows the Feishu startup path completed with the new runtime-initialization assertion on the patched checkout.
What was not tested: Live Feishu WebSocket delivery with real Feishu app credentials.
